content.en:
Primordial Ancestor!

Ye Tian also knew that this Eternal Controller was a master who surpassed the Ten Realms and above, and belonged to the same level of combat power as the Ten Elements Ancestor and the Primordial Ancestor.

However, the Primal Ancestor didn't seem to be in the Origin Realm Sea, and he didn't know much about the specific situation.

But when it comes to the token of the Primal Ancestor, its value should not be low.

"Xuantu Master, what is its use?" Ye Tian asked.

The Xuantu Controller introduced: "Infinite Controller, the Primal Ancestor is a very ancient existence, older than your master and the Ten Elements Ancestor, and the Primordial Ancestor has a very eccentric personality, he has not established any power, nor has he accepted any disciples, he has always been a loner. A long time ago, the Primal Ancestor felt that the path was already at the end, and he felt that the Origin Realm Sea could no longer continue to break through. As a result, his ontology and will clone went deep into the end of the realm from two directions and disappeared completely. Until now, the Primordial Ancestor does not seem to have returned. However, he left a lot of resources and opportunities behind and put them in Taichu Mountain. And the Primal Token is the key to enter the Primal Mountain, and although there are not many such keys, it is not too little, and many Eight-Realm-level controllers or Nine-Realm Controllers have a Primordial Token. Of course. A primordial token only allows one Eternal Master to enter the Primordial Mountain, and as for what can be obtained, it depends on one's own ability. "

"I see. "

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and then chose the Primal Token for the fourth treasure.

"I'm going to ask for this primordial token!"

At this point, Ye Tian's remuneration is enough.

"Thank you, Infinite Master, this time, or I'd really be falling. The Xuantu Controller thanked again.

If it weren't for Ye Tian, he would definitely die.

When he was alive, he had the intimidation of some friends, and even a friend of the Nine Realms-level controllers, and the other masters did not dare to attack him.

But after death, the so-called favor may not be maintained.

At that time, the huge foundation of Xuantian Sect may be gone.

"I'm just here for the reward!" Ye Tian said lightly.

The master of Xuantu said: "Infinite master, if you need help in the future, just say it." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Xuantian Sect.

Soon after, the complete recovery of the Xuantu Masters was announced, and countless Eternal Masters were shocked.

And Ye Tian, the endless controller who solved the physical condition of the master of the Xuantu, was naturally also famous.

......

"Little Senior Brother actually solved the physical condition of the Xuantu Controller?It's a bit surprising, so many Eternal Masters can't do it, I took a closer look, and I also felt that I didn't know where to start, Little Senior Brother actually succeeded!"

The growth rate of this little junior brother is indeed very shocking, if she progresses slowly, she may soon be caught up by him.

"In a few more days, I will have to try to open up the Boundary River, my accumulation is enough, according to Shizun, if I attack the Ten Realm-level masters, the success rate will be more than ninety!" muttered the Snow Maiden Controller.

And ninety percent is already an incomparably high probability, and as for the ten percent probability, it naturally does not exist.

Even if the master had attacked the Ten Realm-level controllers at the beginning, he had already groped for it, and there was not even a ninety percent chance of it.

Immediately, while the Snow Maiden controller was practicing, the will clone went to collect materials and prepare for the opening of the boundary river.

......

"Refining!"

Five Ten Thousand Phase Statues appeared around Ye Tian, and he devoured the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon, his body could easily accommodate the five Ten Thousand Phase Statues and control the power of the five Ten Thousand Phase Statues.

With the five Ten Thousand Phases Statues, his strength has increased a little again.

Moreover, he also refined the Primal Token.

"With my current strength, if I want to be promoted to the Nine Realms level controller, I'm afraid it will take a long time, you can go to Taichu Mountain to have a look, maybe there will be a harvest!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He came to Taichu Mountain alone.

......

Taichu Mountain is an incomparably huge treasure land, and there is a magic circle left by the Taichu Ancestor here, so even the Ten Realm-level controllers can't move Taichu Mountain.

If there was no Primal Token, even a group of Ten Realm-level controllers would not be able to tear through the magic circle here and enter the interior of Primal Mountain.

Now.

Ye Tian stood outside Taichu Mountain and felt the dense magic array.

Each magic circle uses a kind of change of the Dao, and the changes of countless Dao are combined to form this magnificent magic circle.

From these magic circles alone, it can be seen how terrifying the strength of the Primal Ancestor was.

"We still have to use the Primordial Token!"

Ye Tian urged the Primal Token.

Suddenly, the Primal Token formed a layer of shield and shrouded Ye Tian's body.

With this special shield, Ye Tian directly passed through the magic circles and came to the interior of Taichu Mountain.

When he arrived at Taichu Mountain, the shield on Ye Tian's body was lost.

Immediately, Ye Tian habitually used his copying talent to probe the surroundings and sensed some eternal controllers.

Obviously, he was not the only one in the eternal control of the Primordial Mountain.

After all, there are a lot of primordial tokens, and some eternal controllers will naturally look forward to it in the primordial mountain.

Soon, many Eternal Controllers sensed Ye Tian.

"The Infinite Master, too!"

Some of the Eternal Controllers naturally knew Ye Tian and greeted each other, and Ye Tian responded one by one.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to come to an important place in Taichu Mountain-Beihuang River!

The Northern Desolate River is not inside the Taichu Mountain, the Taichu Mountain just has a passage to the Northern Desolate River, and the Northern Desolate River is located in the depths of the Realm, and ordinary Eternal Controllers can't reach there at all, and even the Nine Realm-level Masters can't find there.

Only when the Primal Ancestor established a passage directly to the North Desolate River at the end of the realm could the Eternal Controllers here easily enter the North Desolate River.

For the Eight Realms-level masters, the Beihuang River is also a good treasure land, the only natural treasure land in Taichu Mountain, and the resources here are all natural births, not treasures left by the Taichu Ancestor.

The Taichu Ancestor did leave a lot of good things, but they were all in other places in the Taichu Mountain.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to go to other places, he was going to go to the Beihuang River to take a look first, because the Beihuang River had a special life - the Northern Desolate Beast!

The beast core of the Northern Desolation Beast has the effect of refining the primordial-level control body, although the effect is very weak, but if there are enough Northern Desolation Beast Beast Core, the effect is quite good.

The only trouble is that the Northern Desolation Beasts are very powerful, and the weakest ones are comparable to the Seven Realms-level controllers, and the strong ones are even comparable to the Nine Realms-level controllers.

Moreover, the suppression of the Eternal Masters by the Northern Desolate River is very large, and the perception will be greatly limited, and that is the home of the Northern Desolate Beasts, once it is besieged, even the Nine Realm-level Masters have a chance of falling.

After all, there are very few people who have the control of the volitional form, so not many people dare to enter the North Wilderness River.

For example, the master of the Xuantu has been there a few times.

And the reason why the Xuantu master's body collapsed was that he died, left directly from the Beihuang River, went deep into the end of the realm, and entered another place, and this was when something big happened.
